downloadTitle: Decide When Microsoft 365 Copilot or an Agent Is the Right Tool for Your Work – Quick Reference Guide
downloadDescription: Use this one-page Microsoft 365 Copilot cheat sheet to evaluate AI-generated content for clarity, accuracy, tone, and coverage. Learn how to judge readiness, identify weaknesses, and determine whether output should be revised, validated, or shared.
detailsSection:
This downloadable quick-reference guide helps determine when Microsoft 365 Copilot, an agent, or a human-led approach is most appropriate for a task. The framework teaches four decision factors:

Repeatability
Risk Exposure
Error Detectability
Time Sensitivity
Use this cheat sheet before automating, delegating, or redesigning workflow steps. The guide includes practical prompts, decision criteria, and readiness checks that help balance efficiency with accountability, ensuring the right level of human oversight remains in place.
installInstructionSection:
1. Select the Download button to start the download.
  2. The download should start automatically. If prompted, select Save or Save this program to disk.
  3. Select Open file, or find the file on your device and open it.
